description_long: This is an adult woman with a slender build, standing with arms slightly outstretched. She is wearing a sleeveless, knee-length dress with a deep V-neckline and an open back, paired with simple flat shoes. Her hair is styled in a chin-length bob with a side part, partially covering one eye. The dress fits closely to her body, accentuating her figure, and the back view reveals the dress is cut low, exposing her upper back. Her posture is upright and neutral, as if she is waiting or ready to walk. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A standing adult woman in a sleeveless, knee-length dress with a deep V-neck and open back, wearing flat shoes and a chin-length bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep V-neckline of the dress, arms slightly out, and the bob hairstyle partially covering one eye.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fitted silhouette of the dress, the open back, and the flat shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back of the dress, the straight hemline, and the back of the bob haircut.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the dress's fit and the arm and leg positioning.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless knee-length dress with deep V-neck and open back
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
